title: Playback Capabilities
subtitle: Local-first controls for every screen, every format, every session.

campaigns.title: Local Bundles
campaigns.description: Import video, Scene2D, or Scene3D bundles directly from your disk.

brandFilms.title: Multi-Screen Playback
brandFilms.description: Assign different wallpapers per display, with menu bar and per-screen controls.

trailers.title: Smart Pause Rules
trailers.description: Auto-pause on full-screen apps, desktop activity, or power-saving mode.

shortFilms.title: Audio Control
shortFilms.description: Per-screen volume, mute, and global playback toggles.

animation.title: Screen Saver Mode
animation.description: Export the Codelume screen saver for seamless idle transitions.

social.title: Sandboxed & Offline
social.description: Runs inside macOS sandbox with zero outbound network traffic.
